title: AppleCraft Ultimate
description: Adds more powerful apples to the game!
body: # AppleCraft Ultimate ### About This mod adds more types off apples to the game! From baked to diamond apples enjoy any type you like! ### Tips - Try cooking a apple on a campfire! - Combine with my resource pack Plate Pack to put your apples on plates! - Use the coal apple as fuel! ### Current Custom Apples *As of version 3.3.0* - Diamond Apple - Cobblestone Apple - Baked Apple - Netherite Apple - Dirt Apple - Poisonous Apple - Iron Apple - Stone Apple - Coal Apple - TNT Apple - Redstone Apple - Emerald Apple - Wooden Apple - Copper Apple - Ender Apple - Amethyst Apple - Leather Apple - Gravel Apple - Brick Apple - Hay Apple - Raw Beef Apple - Cooked Beef Apple ### Sources - **[Modrinth](modrinth.com/mod/applecraft-ultimate)** - **Curseforge**
